clusters.justification: These terms share macroscopic co-activation patterns within the extended limbic and autonomic networks, forming a broad functional axis centered on emotional reactivity, physiological arousal, and subjective valence.

Rooted in the co-activation of frontostriatal and mesolimbic circuitry, these terms describe a macroscopic cognitive domain dedicated to appraising subjective worth, incentive processing, and goal-directed decision making.

Anchored predominantly in the topography of the default mode network, these terms map onto an overarching functional axis responsible for internally directed simulation, encompassing both self-referential processing and the modeling of others.
